coin_id.description: CoinGecko coin id (e.g. bitcoin) to read the metadata/market snapshot for.

api_key.description: Optional CoinGecko pro API key, sent on the x-cg-pro-api-key header. Unauthenticated calls against the public base URL are allowed; a key unlocks the pro base URL and higher limits. Never logged.

base_url.description: CoinGecko API base URL, e.g. https://api.coingecko.com/api/v3 (public) or https://pro-api.coingecko.com/api/v3 (pro, when api_key is set). Legacy derives this automatically from whether api_key is present; this dialect's spec.json 'default' materialization is a fixed literal only, with no api_key-conditional derivation mechanism, so base_url is required here instead -- see docs.md's Known limits.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
